summary: Eurocommerce, the European retail association whose members include Amazon, H&M, Inditex, and Ikea, is asking EU tech chief Henna Virkkunen to exempt AI-generated advertisements from the bloc’s new regulation requiring disclosure of AI use. Retailers are already using AI widely to generate marketing images, with German online retailer Zalando saying the technology has allowed it to cut content production costs by 90%, while fast-fashion retailers H&M and Zara are using AI-generated clones of models.
